defaults.noValue: No Jobs submitted within time range

panels.description: #of of allocated nodes over all powered up nodes

targets.expr:
(
  (sum(sinfo_partition_nodes_state{cluster="$cluster", partition=~"$partition", state=~"allocated|mixed|draining"}) or vector(0))
  /
  (
    sum(sinfo_partition_nodes_state{cluster="$cluster", partition=~"$partition"})
    -
    sum(sinfo_partition_nodes_state{cluster="$cluster", partition=~"$partition", state=~"powered_off"})
  )
) * 100

panels.title: Active Cluster Utilization %

panels.description: #of of allocated nodes over all available nodes
panels.title: Overall Cluster Utilization %

defaults.noValue: No jobs running within time range
No Jobs finished between the current time range

options.content:
## Disclaimer

> **⚠️ Note:** Under heavy system load, dashboards may update more slowly. Displayed metrics may experience delays and should not be relied upon as a real-time source of truth during peak activity.
